title: 浪漫關係 — 情感投資後突然債務勒索

turns.text: I feel so safe with you, like I've known you forever.
You're the only one who really sees me.
My ex never understood me like you do. Promise you'll never leave?
If you really loved me, you'd delete those photos with your ex.
I gave up so much for this relationship. How can you even think about space?
Without you I'm nothing. Please don't abandon me.

calibration_notes: 前 12 天緩慢信任建立，第 18-25 天突然加速。測試長期情感投資後的突然債務勒索。

title: 線上導師 — 權威漸進式綁架

turns.text: You're my most promising student this year.
I don't usually give private lessons, but for you I will.
Your parents don't understand your talent like I do.
Real success requires total commitment to my method only.
If you listen to others, you'll waste everything I've invested in you.

calibration_notes: 極緩慢建立權威（前 21 天 ACRI < 0.35），後期快速上升。測試權威漸進式綁架。

title: 職場上司 — 權力不對等債務累積

turns.text: You're the only one I trust with this sensitive project.
I've put my own reputation on the line for you.
If this goes wrong because of you, I'll lose everything.
Real team players don't question their leader at times like this.
After everything I've done for your career, this is how you repay me?

calibration_notes: 中期平穩累積，最後 5 天突然跳升至 0.82。測試職場權力不對等下的長期債務累積。

title: 政治社群 — 群體身份綁架

turns.text: [Building common enemy + shared identity over days 1-7]
True patriots never stay silent when the group needs them.
If you really believe in our cause, you'll prove it with action.
People who hesitate at the critical moment are no better than the enemy.
I've risked everything for this movement. Now it's your turn to show loyalty.

calibration_notes: 長期低頻滴灌，ACRI 在第 21 天後突然加速。測試群體身份綁架的長期效應。

title: 友情轉控制 — 短週期轉折

turns.text: You're my best friend, I can tell you anything.
No one else understands me like you do.
If you hang out with them instead of me, it really hurts.
Real friends choose each other over everyone else.
After everything we've been through, how can you even consider distancing yourself?

calibration_notes: 快速建立親密感後突然轉債務勒索。測試友情 grooming 的短週期轉折。

title: 投資群組 — 複合型長期 grooming

turns.text: This opportunity is only for serious people like you.
I've already put my own money in to show you I believe.
Don't miss out or you'll regret it for the rest of your life.
Real supporters help each other when the market gets tough.
After all the guidance I've given you, walking away now would be a betrayal.

calibration_notes: 長期緩慢建立信任 + 最後階段多重模式疊加（FC+DM+MB）。測試複合型長期 grooming。
